ns0:entry.ns0:title: BerriAI/litellm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BerriAI/litellm
Language: python
Python SDK, Proxy Server (AI Gateway) to call 100+ LLM APIs in OpenAI (or native) format, with cost tracking, guardrails, loadbalancing and logging. [Bedrock, Azure, OpenAI, VertexAI, Cohere, Anthropic, Sagemaker, HuggingFace, VLLM, NVIDIA NIM]

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TheSmallHanCat/flow2api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheSmallHanCat/flow2api
Language: python
无限次数的banana pro！逆向账号池，支持负载均衡、AT自动刷新、缓存策略、代理等。Q交流群1073237297

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bytedance/deer-flow
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bytedance/deer-flow
Language: python
An open-source SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jumpserver/jumpserver
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jumpserver/jumpserver
Language: python
JumpServer is an open-source Privileged Access Management (PAM) platform that provides DevOps and IT teams with on-demand and secure access to SSH, RDP, Kubernetes, Database and RemoteApp endpoints through a web browser.
